value:
A red scarf from Alear just like the one
Sommie wears. Its design is quite
simple, but that's what makes it cute.

value:
A special scarf from Alear woven with
bond fragments. Will wearing this
make you look like Sommie?

A Calisson chicken from Alear. It can
be raised in the stables on the Somniel.
Its soft and warm belly is irresistible.

A lively aura eagle from Alear. Its
sharp talons can dig in, but whoever's
holding it will surely look impressive.

value:
A quill from Jade used for writing
novels. It's so light and easy to use
that the words just seem to flow.

value:
A quill from Jade used for writing

A homemade sandwich for lunch from
Boucheron. There was one more, but
Etie ate it.

A young dragon. He races across the battlefield
with Sommie, the guardian spirit of the Somniel.
Appears in Fire Emblem Engage.

A young dragon. She throws herself into battle,
dressing as she did at the Somniel and
carrying a legendary sword. Appears in
Fire Emblem Engage.

A knight of Brodia and Diamant's retainer. She
is a calm and composed warrior who writes
stories as part of her daily routine. Appears in
Fire Emblem Engage.

Royal knight of Firene and retainer to Prince
Alfred. He is a gentle giant with a naturally
muscular build. Appears in Fire Emblem Engage.

Seiðr's daughter from the future. She seeks help
from the present Seiðr to find her twin
sister, Alvíg.

Mythic Effect: Light
Boost: HP+5, Atk+3

Grants allies this Mythic Effect during Light
season, if the Light blessing has been conferred
and if this unit enters battle in Aether Raids with
them: Light-blessed allies boost the Aetheric
Lift acquired for successful attacks during Light
season. (This boost is limited to the number of
Mythic Heroes × the number of Heroes with the
blessing conferred × 10.)

During Light season, this Mythic Hero will
boost Aetheric Lift acquisition for successful
attacks depending on number of merges. (This
boost is limited to the number of times the unit
has been merged × 1.)

Boost: Raiding Party Bonus

【Bonded】
Grants a status that can trigger certain skill

Grants bonus to unit's Atk/Spd/Def/Res =
X × 3 (X = number of allies with the Divinely

cooldown count-X to unit before foe's first
attack, and when unit deals damage to foe
during combat, restores X × 4 HP to unit
during combat.

【Potent Follow 100%】
Triggers an additional follow-up attack
immediately after unit's standard follow-up
attack and deals damage = 100% of
unit's normal attack damage (if unit cannot
make a follow-up attack, this effect triggers
when the standard follow-up attack would
occur; this effect is treated like a follow-up
attack, so effects like "reduce damage by
X%" still apply, but this effect is not affected
by effects that prevent follow-ups or
"attacks twice" effects; only highest
value applied; does not stack).
